_doc: Per-family row-count gate for the v12 build pipeline. Per v12_plan.txt §4.1 and §11 #6 (sign-off: 10% tolerance = thresholds set to 0.9 x §3.1 target). Each entry is { axis, target, reject_if_below, shortname_patterns }. The build halts before train/val split if any family in this file is below its reject_if_below value in the post-dedup corpus. shortname_patterns are exact matches OR prefix matches (trailing '*' = prefix match).

axes._note: v12 plan §5.3 aspirational target was 12,000; §3.1 realistic was 10,000. Underlying SigmaHQ + malware-family seeds saturate at ~5K from existing templates; the soc_generator.py adds ~5K complementary rows (sigma logic, malware families, IR playbook, triage rubric). 10K target / 9K floor avoids the saturation risk flagged in the v12 §11 saturation guardrail review.
